contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Resolved truesight_me beta→prod merge conflict and promoted (CNAME-safe)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_prod/pull/18
  
  Details:
  truesight_me_beta and truesight_me_prod had diverged (beta +25, prod +39 commits) so gh repo sync could not fast-forward. Diagnosed via a local test merge: two conflicts — stats/current.json (machine-regenerated every 6h) and blog/posts/the-scripture-is-not-the-point.html (add/add; prod had the correct Chinese 教外别传, beta had mojibake ·&&&&&&, a beta-side regression). Resolved both in prod's favor; CNAME correctly stayed truesight.me because a real merge (not a force-sync) was used, avoiding the known beta.truesight.me clobber footgun. Net content promoted: beta's richer manifest markdown renderer in js/program-shell.js (headings, ordered/unordered lists, paragraph breaks); everything else beta had was already on prod. Pushed the merge as a branch to truesight_me_prod, opened and merged PR #18, and verified post-merge that prod CNAME == truesight.me and the blog line == 教外别传. Histories reconciled so the next promotion syncs cleanly. Restored the local beta checkout to its original state.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
